entries.title: Prototype live update test
entries.description: Prototype live update test: guest names are now supported.

entries.title: API key testing fix
entries.description: API key testing has been improved. Provider tests now use safer defaults and accept valid provider responses even when the response body is unusual. Install the latest APK build for the Android-side bridge fix.

entries.title: Mobile shell test is ready
entries.description: Use this PWA view to check phone layout, touch targets, offline cache, and remote-only tool messaging before APK packaging.

entries.title: Desktop tools stay visible
entries.description: Blender, Godot, and STL tools show synced logs/assets/results on mobile, but local execution is blocked on phone and must run on the desktop host.
